column1: # model-prices.tsv — USD per 1,000,000 tokens, used by capture-cost.sh to derive the
# lifecycle/phase $ from transcript token counts. Matched by PREFIX (a model id matches
# the first row whose prefix it starts with). SESSION $ on the HUD uses the harness's
# authoritative cost.total_cost_usd; this map is only for per-phase attribution (approximate).
# SELF-IMPROVING: update when Anthropic pricing changes. cache_write is the 5-minute-TTL
# rate (1.25x input); cache_read is 0.1x input. Source: the claude-api skill price table.
